2603.17765.title: Grounded Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Drafting of Radiology Impressions Using Case-Based Similarity Search
2603.17765.paper_summary: Automated radiology report generation has gained increasing attention with the rise of deep learning and large language models. However, fully generative approaches often suffer from hallucinations and lack clinical grounding, limiting their reliability in real-world workflows. In this study, we propose a multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system for grounded drafting of chest radiograph impressions. The system combines contrastive image-text embeddings, case-based similarity retrieval, and citation-constrained draft generation to ensure factual alignment with historical radiology reports. A curated subset of the MIMIC-CXR dataset was used to construct a multimodal retrieval database. Image embeddings were generated using CLIP encoders, while textual embeddings were derived from structured impression sections. A fusion similarity framework was implemented using FAISS indexing for scalable nearest-neighbor retrieval. Retrieved cases were used to construct grounded prompts for draft impression generation, with safety mechanisms enforcing citation coverage and confidence-based refusal. Experimental results demonstrate that multimodal fusion significantly improves retrieval performance compared to image-only retrieval, achieving Recall@5 above 0.95 on clinically relevant findings. The grounded drafting pipeline produces interpretable outputs with explicit citation traceability, enabling improved trustworthiness compared to conventional generative approaches. This work highlights the potential of retrieval-augmented multimodal systems for reliable clinical decision support and radiology workflow augmentation
2603.17765.paper_summary_zh: 自動化放射科報告生成隨著深度學習和大型語言模型的興起而受到越來越多的關注。<lb/>然而，完全生成的方法往往會遭受幻覺並缺乏臨床基礎，限制了它們在現實工作流程中的可靠性。<lb/>在這項研究中，我們提出了一種多模態檢索增強生成（RAG）系統，用於胸部X光印象的基礎草擬。<lb/>該系統結合了對比圖像-文本嵌入、基於案例的相似性檢索和受限引用的草擬生成，以確保與歷史放射科報告的事實一致性。<lb/>我們使用MIMIC-CXR數據集的精選子集來構建多模態檢索數據庫。<lb/>圖像嵌入是使用CLIP編碼器生成的，而文本嵌入則來自結構化的印象部分。<lb/>我們實施了一個融合相似性框架，使用FAISS索引進行可擴展的最近鄰檢索。<lb/>檢索到的案例被用來構建基於事實的提示，以生成草擬印象，並且安全機制強制執行引用覆蓋和基於信心的拒絕。<lb/>實驗結果表明，與僅圖像檢索相比，多模態融合顯著提高了檢索性能，在臨床相關發現上達到超過0.95的Recall@5。<lb/>這個基於事實的草擬流程生成的輸出可解釋，並具有明確的引用可追溯性，與傳統生成方法相比，增強了可信度。<lb/>這項工作突顯了檢索增強多模態系統在可靠的臨床決策支持和放射科工作流程增強中的潛力。
2603.17765.author: Himadri Samanta et.al.
